metadata.description: Agent Skills for text chunking, offline documentation search, and unified embeddings using Chonkie, Mandex, and Catsu

plugins.name: chonkie
plugins.description: Fast, lightweight text chunking for RAG pipelines. 11 chunker types (Token, Fast, Sentence, Recursive, Semantic, Late, Code, Neural, Slumber, Table, TeraflopAI), Pipeline API for end-to-end ingestion workflows, embeddings refineries, and vector DB integrations (Chroma, Qdrant, Pinecone, Weaviate, and more).

plugins.name: mandex
plugins.description: Offline documentation packages for AI agents. Pull searchable docs from CDN, full-text search with BM25 + ONNX semantic reranking, build custom .mandex packages from markdown, and auto-sync project dependency docs. 36+ packages across npm, pip, and cargo ecosystems.

plugins.name: catsu
plugins.description: Unified embedding API client for 11 providers (OpenAI, VoyageAI, Cohere, Jina, Mistral, Gemini, and more) through a single interface. Built-in retry logic, cost tracking, model discovery, Matryoshka dimension reduction, and async support. Python and Rust.
